content.problemStatement:
Chef has a sequence AAA consisting of NNN positive integers.

He is playing a game with this sequence. The goal of the game is to maximize the greatest common divisor of all elements of the sequence. Chef may perform the following operation an arbitrary number of times (including zero):


Choose a positive integer ddd and a valid index iii such that AiA_iAi‚Äã is divisible by d2d^2d2.
Divide AiA_iAi‚Äã by d2d^2d2.
Choose a valid index jjj (not necessarily different from iii) and multiply AjA_jAj‚Äã by ddd.
Help Chef and find the maximum GCD of all integers in the sequence he could obtain if he plays optimally!
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains a single integer NNN.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers A1,A2,‚Ä¶,ANA_1, A_2, \dots, A_NA1‚Äã,A2‚Äã,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äã.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print a single line containing one integer ‚Äî the maximum possible value of the greatest common divisor of all elements of the sequence.
